title: No error is given when incorrect timezone value is specified for a timetz column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE timetz_tbl (f1 timetz, f2 varchar(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO timetz_tbl VALUES ('00:01:00+01', 'Another Valid Timezone');
INSERT INTO timetz_tbl VALUES ('00:02:00+02', 'Yet Another Valid Timezone');
SELECT f1, f2, f1::varchar(30) as time_str FROM timetz_tbl WHERE f1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect timezone value for timetz column
